items.title: West Asia Airspace Situation – Indian carriers plan 50 flights today
items.snippet: Press Release:Press Information Bureau Ministry of Civil Aviation West Asia Airspace Situation – Indian carriers plan 50 flights today Posted On: 09 MAR 2026 12:08AM by PIB Delhi The Ministry of Civil Aviation is closely monitoring the evolving situation in the West Asia affecting air travel between India and the West Asia region. Airlines are undertaking necessary operational adjustments in view of the prevailing co…
